name: ai-team-os
description: AI Agent Team Operating System for Claude Code with 140+ MCP tools (incl. 30+ ecosystem research tools), 40+ agent templates, 11+ lifecycle hooks. Persistent team management, structured meetings, task wall with pipeline workflows, company loop engine, real-time React dashboard, and Ecosystem Research Platform (project-isolated GitHub repo index with multi-layer tagging, deep-review workflow, and weekly auto-summary).
